title: Jeffrey Galkin, Attorney - Murthy Law Firm | U.S Immigration Law
content:
## Jeffrey Galkin, Attorney
Jeffrey Galkin is an Attorney of the Murthy Law Firm, the nation’s leading immigration practice. Jeffrey has built a reputation for helping clients navigate the complexities of the immigration process. Jeffrey represents companies and individuals on a wide range of employment-based and family-based immigrant petitions and applications, including PERM labor certifications, immigrant petitions, applications to adjust status, and naturalization.
Prior to joining Murthy Law Firm, Jeffrey had a broad range of experience, including working on immigration matters while in law school and serving as judicial intern for the Supreme Court of Maryland (formerly Court of Appeals).

## Types of Cases Worked on by Attorney Jeffrey Galkin
Revisiting the Debate: Adjustment of Status vs. Consular Processing
Tips for Companies to Ensure Smoother PERM Process
Murthy Success: A Simple Solution in a Complex Immigration Journey

- Bachelor of Talmudic Law, Yeshiva College of the Nation’s Capital

- Lost in a Maze of USCIS Policy on Child Immigration Status by Jeffrey Galkin & Anna Stepanova, for Law360 (30.Oct.2023)
- Preserving U.S. Residence for Naturalization , murthy.com (15.Aug.2024)
- Determining Normal Position Requirements for PERM , murthy.com (13.May.2024)
- U.S. Domicile Requirement for Family-Based Green Card Sponsorship , murthy.com (27.Nov.2023)
